top_signals.title: Mukesh Ambani Says Jio Platforms to File IPO Papers Friday
top_signals.summary: Billionaire Mukesh Ambani said Reliance Industries Ltd.’s digital unit will submit its listing documents by Friday, starting the process of unlocking shareholder value in one of India’s most-anticipated initial public offerings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Collapsed Lender MFS Said to Have Never Registered £300 Million of Mortgages
top_signals.summary: A £300 million ($396 million) portfolio of mortgages linked to collapsed lender Market Financial Solutions Ltd. looks to never have been registered with public property records, according to court filings, threatening to complicate lenders’ efforts to establish their claims over the underlying assets.

top_signals.title: Starmer says he would stand in a Labour leadership race
top_signals.summary: Greater Manchester mayor’s victory in Makerfield clears path for attempt to become Labour leader and prime minister

top_signals.title: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
top_signals.summary: Near-record OP_RETURN usage is driving a surge in low-value Bitcoin transactions, pushing Bitcoin network activity close to all-time highs despite muted price action.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Strategy’s preferred stock STRC continues to trade under $90 as trading volume jumps
top_signals.summary: Strategy's preferred STRC stock closed again under $90 for the second consecutive day at $88.59, having drifted as low as $82.50.
